title: kb.ask v1
description: Emitted by kb's `kb ask` command (src/commands/ask/mod.rs:397) after producing an answer, before any optional synthesis. Source: /kb.

proven.description: Number of matched entries with proven/verified evidence.

thin_coverage.description: Whether the answer was flagged as thinly covered by evidence.

project.description: Project scope filter applied to the query, if any.

contradictions.description: Number of contradictions surfaced against the answer.

hardlines.description: Number of registered hardlines relevant to the answer.
